sentence: 法律保护公民的财产权不受侵犯。
pinyin: Fǎlǜ bǎohù gōngmín de cáichǎnquán bù shòu qīnfàn.
english: The law protects citizens' property rights from infringement.

sentence: 他爬到了山的顶端，俯瞰整个城市。
pinyin: Tā pá dào le shān de dǐngduān, fǔkàn zhěnggè chéngshì.
english: He climbed to the summit and looked down over the entire city.

sentence: 他说话太快，我完全听不懂。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà tài kuài, wǒ wánquán tīng bù dǒng.
english: He speaks too fast; I can't understand a word he says.
He bought a complete set of kitchen utensils.

pinyin: Jiē shàng yǒu rén zài fā chuándān.
english: Someone was handing out fliers on the street.
